name: PricingTier
goal: Display a single pricing tier card with name, price, feature list, and optional CTA; composes into a grid via ce-grid.
description: A card-shaped pricing tier: badge, tier name, sub-headline, big-number price, feature list (JSON or slot children), and an optional CTA button or link. Use highlighted for the recommended tier. Compose side-by-side via ce-grid instead of a dedicated pricing container (CDR-006).

props.name: name
props.description: Tier name shown as the heading (e.g. Free, Pro, Enterprise). Required because every tier must be identifiable.

props.name: sub
props.description: Sub-headline beneath the tier name (e.g. "for teams up to 20").

props.name: price
props.description: Price string displayed large (e.g. "1 990 ₽", "по запросу"). Override with slot="price" for rich markup (strikethrough, badge, etc.).

props.name: period
props.description: Period suffix appended to the price in smaller text (e.g. "мес", "year").

props.name: badge
props.description: Short label shown above the tier name as a pill badge (e.g. "Популярный", "Best value"). Override with slot="badge" for rich markup.

props.name: highlighted
props.description: When true, the card border becomes 2px solid --ce-color-blue, visually emphasising this tier as the recommended choice.

props.name: cta
props.description: Call-to-action label. When set, renders a button. When cta-href is also set, renders as an <a>. Omit (and leave slot="cta" empty) to suppress the CTA entirely.

props.name: ctaHref
props.description: When set alongside cta, the CTA renders as an <a href> instead of a <button>.

props.name: features
props.description: JSON array of feature objects {label, included?, note?}. When non-empty, wins over default slot children (CDR-005). Use the slot for rich or handwritten markup; use this for generator / server-side output.

events.name: ce-pricing-cta
events.description: Fires when the button-form CTA is clicked (only when cta-href is not set).

slots.description: Feature items. Each direct child receives a checkmark prefix via CSS. Children with the not-included attribute receive a × prefix and muted color. Children with the included attribute receive explicit ✓. Ignored when the features JSON prop is non-empty (CDR-005).

slots.name: price
slots.description: Rich price override. Replaces the price attribute rendering. Use for strikethrough, combined badges, sub-decimal notation, etc. (CDR-002).

slots.name: badge
slots.description: Rich badge override. Replaces the badge attribute rendering.

slots.name: cta
slots.description: Rich CTA override. Replaces the cta/cta-href rendering. Use for custom buttons or links.

slots.name: footer
slots.description: Optional area below features, separated by a border. Use for footnotes, fine print, or extra links.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-2
cssVariables.description: Feature item gap, CTA top margin, period left margin, badge/footer padding.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-4
cssVariables.description: Card vertical padding and CTA horizontal padding.

cssVariables.name: --ce-color-blue
cssVariables.description: Highlighted border, CTA text color, badge text.

cssVariables.name: --ce-color-blue-bg
cssVariables.description: Badge background and CTA hover background.

cssVariables.name: --ce-color-green
cssVariables.description: Checkmark icon color for included features.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text
cssVariables.description: Tier name and price text color.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text-inverse
cssVariables.description: CTA text color when highlighted (fills button).

cssVariables.name: --ce-muted
cssVariables.description: Sub-headline, period, and footer text color.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text-xs
cssVariables.description: Badge and feature note font size.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text-sm
cssVariables.description: Sub-headline, period, feature items, CTA font size.

cssVariables.name: --ce-line-tight
cssVariables.description: Line height for name and price.

a11y.notes: The price wrapper carries an aria-label combining price and period for screen readers. The CTA uses native <button> or <a> so ARIA semantics are native. Feature checkmarks are aria-hidden; text labels carry the accessible meaning.
